'''âzh-r-n''' ('''zhrn''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:live|live]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:live|live]]
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-r-n
|-
! Lemma
| zhrn
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizharan|thizharan]] || [[word:jizharan|jizharan]] || [[word:shizharan|shizharan]] || [[word:kizharan|kizharan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzharan|thuthuzharan]] || [[word:jujuzharan|jujuzharan]] || [[word:shushuzharan|shushuzharan]] || [[word:kukuzharan|kukuzharan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzharan|thuzharan]] || [[word:juzharan|juzharan]] || [[word:shuzharan|shuzharan]] || [[word:kuzharan|kuzharan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzharan|thuzharan]] || [[word:juzharan|juzharan]] || [[word:shuzharan|shuzharan]] || [[word:kuzharan|kuzharan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezharan|thezharan]] || [[word:jezharan|jezharan]] || [[word:shezharan|shezharan]] || [[word:kezharan|kezharan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozharan|thothozharan]] || [[word:jojozharan|jojozharan]] || [[word:shoshozharan|shoshozharan]] || [[word:kokozharan|kokozharan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozharan|thozharan]] || [[word:jozharan|jozharan]] || [[word:shozharan|shozharan]] || [[word:kozharan|kozharan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozharan|thozharan]] || [[word:jozharan|jozharan]] || [[word:shozharan|shozharan]] || [[word:kozharan|kozharan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzharan|thĂŠzharan]] || [[word:jĂŠzharan|jĂŠzharan]] || [[word:shĂŠzharan|shĂŠzharan]] || [[word:kĂŠzharan|kĂŠzharan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazharan|thathazharan]] || [[word:jajazharan|jajazharan]] || [[word:shashazharan|shashazharan]] || [[word:kakazharan|kakazharan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazharan|thazharan]] || [[word:jazharan|jazharan]] || [[word:shazharan|shazharan]] || [[word:kazharan|kazharan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazharan|thazharan]] || [[word:jazharan|jazharan]] || [[word:shazharan|shazharan]] || [[word:kazharan|kazharan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazharan|shazharan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazharan|goshazharan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazharan|gokishazharan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazharanĂŒ|shazharanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazharanknĂŒ|goshazharanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazharanĂŒ|gokishazharanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazharanshĂ«|shazharanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazharankshĂ«|goshazharankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazharanshĂ«|gokishazharanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazharanro|shazharanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazharankro|goshazharankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazharanro|gokishazharanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazharanmu|shazharanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazharankmu|goshazharankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazharanmu|gokishazharanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazharansher|shazharansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazharanksher|goshazharanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazharansher|gokishazharansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazharang|shazharang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazharankng|goshazharankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazharang|gokishazharang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazharanya|shazharanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazharankya|goshazharankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazharanya|gokishazharanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazharanyam|shazharanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazharankyam|goshazharankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazharanyam|gokishazharanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazharanĂŒshĂ«|shazharanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazharanknĂŒshĂ«|goshazharanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazharanĂŒshĂ«|gokishazharanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazharanĂŒro|shazharanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazharanknĂŒro|goshazharanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazharanĂŒro|gokishazharanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazharanĂŒmu|shazharanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazharanknĂŒmu|goshazharanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazharanĂŒmu|gokishazharanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazharanshĂ«nĂŒ|shazharanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazharankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazharankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazharanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazharanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazharanshĂ«ro|shazharanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazharankshĂ«ro|goshazharankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazharanshĂ«ro|gokishazharanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazharanshĂ«mu|shazharanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazharankshĂ«mu|goshazharankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazharanshĂ«mu|gokishazharanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazharanronĂŒ|shazharanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazharankronĂŒ|goshazharankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazharanronĂŒ|gokishazharanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazharanroshĂ«|shazharanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazharankroshĂ«|goshazharankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazharanroshĂ«|gokishazharanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazharanromu|shazharanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazharankromu|goshazharankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazharanromu|gokishazharanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazharanmunĂŒ|shazharanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazharankmunĂŒ|goshazharankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazharanmunĂŒ|gokishazharanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazharanmushĂ«|shazharanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazharankmushĂ«|goshazharankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazharanmushĂ«|gokishazharanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazharanmuro|shazharanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazharankmuro|goshazharankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazharanmuro|gokishazharanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
